instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) to introduce yourself. Answer these questions: What is your name? How old are you? Where are you from? What is your job/status?
model_answer: My name is John. I am twenty-five years old. I am from London, England. I am a student at the university. I live in a small apartment. My favorite color is blue. I am very happy to meet you.

instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) about your room. Answer these questions: What color is your room? What furniture is there? Where is your bed?
target_structures: Prepositions of place (on, in, under, next to)
model_answer: My room is light blue and very clean. There is a big bed next to the window. There is a wooden desk and a comfortable chair. On the desk, there is a computer. There are two lamps on the table. I love my room.

instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) about your family. Answer these questions: How many people are in your family? What are their names and jobs? Do you have any pets?
model_answer: There are four people in my family. My father's name is Mark. He is an engineer. My mother's name is Sarah. She is a teacher. I have one sister. Her name is Lily. We have a small dog named Max. I love my family.

instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) about your day. Answer these questions: What time do you wake up? What do you eat for breakfast? How do you go to work/school?
model_answer: I wake up at 7 o'clock every morning. I wash my face and brush my teeth. I have breakfast at 8 o'clock. I eat eggs and bread. I drink coffee. Then, I go to work by bus. I love my mornings.

instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) about your favorite food. Answer these questions: What is your favorite food? What is in it? Why do you like it?
model_answer: My favorite food is pasta with tomato sauce. It has tomatoes, cheese, and garlic. It is very delicious and easy to cook. I also like pizza, but I don't like fast food because it is not healthy. I eat pasta every Sunday.

instruction: Write a short paragraph (40-60 words) about your next weekend. Answer these questions: What do you do on Saturday? Who do you meet? Where do you go on Sunday?
model_answer: On Saturday morning, I go to the gym. Then, I meet my friends for lunch. On Sunday, I go to the park with my dog. We walk for one hour. In the evening, I watch a movie at home. It is a relaxing weekend.
